keywords.job: I buy all kinds of armory and weapons.
keywords.name: Won't tell you.
keywords.snake: Boss of the tavern. He's alright.
keywords.eye: Boss of the tavern. He's alright.
keywords.tavern: Drink and eat there. What else do you do in a tavern!
keywords.brat: Bah. Women are not good for fighting. I don't need them. And I don't like them.
keywords.women: Bah. Women are not good for fighting. I don't need them. And I don't like them.
keywords.woman: Bah. Women are not good for fighting. I don't need them. And I don't like them.
keywords.durin: Forget Durin. He's the worst anyway.
keywords.tibia: Tibia. At least there's one good place in Tibia. Here!
keywords.thais: Ha! Thais. I lived there. You know, I was in the royal army. But it's all wrong. I deserted.
keywords.royal: Good fighter training. But for the wrong cause.
keywords.army: Good fighter training. But for the wrong cause.
keywords.cause: Don't want to talk about it.
keywords.talk: I said, I do not want to talk about it
keywords.kazordoon: Dwarfs are good people. I like them.
keywords.edron: Might be a good place to live. But I'm afraid that the people are Thais friendly.
keywords.wild: Yeah. I'm a wild warrior. Well, to be honest, I left them. They became too aggressive. Attacking everyone is not good.
keywords.warrior: Yeah. I'm a wild warrior. Well, to be honest, I left them. They became too aggressive. Attacking everyone is not good.
keywords.camp: Most people in the camp are no wild warriors.
keywords.hid: Wild warriors have always something to hide.
keywords.key: Oh. that's a new key. Hmmm. Must be for the new hideout.
keywords.hideout: I left the wild warriors, while we - well - they planned a new hideout.
keywords.new: It's somewhere in the woods, of course. I don't know where.
keywords.woods: The woods are good to hide.
keywords.building: You mean our old building in the southwest?
keywords.mechanics: Yes. Security doors driven by POWERFUL machines. But I have no idea how it works.
keywords.machines: Yes. Security doors driven by POWERFUL machines. But I have no idea how it works.
keywords.collapsed: Yes. That's why we - well - they planned a new hideout. But I think they left the vault in the old hideout.
keywords.vault: Good stuff in there, I think.
keywords.stuff: Ahm. I don't know what it is. Sorry.
keywords.sell: I buy nearly everything. Just ask.

texts: Hmmm. I buy weapons, armor, and other stuff. What do you want, ?
I don't serve brats. Sod off!
I buy all kinds of armory and weapons.

greetingPatterns.response: Hmmm. I buy weapons, armor, and other stuff. What do you want, %N?
I don't serve brats. Sod off!

entries.response: That's the old hideout. It's interesting down there. Lots of security mechanics and traps. But it collapsed partly.
Sorry, you do not have so many.
Hmmm. Let me think. I think, you need something big. And steel reinforced. A barrel, maybe.
